# LeoLan Digital — AI Concierge for Hotels & Resorts

## What We Do
LeoLan Digital provides AI-powered guest experience automation for boutique hotels and resorts worldwide. We offer digital room service, multilingual WhatsApp concierge, review management, and social media automation.

## Products
- **AI Concierge**: WhatsApp-based digital room service, 24/7 multilingual
- **Review Management**: Automated AI responses to Google reviews
- **Social Media Automation**: Daily posts on Instagram & Facebook
- **Google Business Optimization**: Always up-to-date hotel profile
- **Live Dashboard**: All bookings and metrics in real time
- **Guest Communication**: Automated pre-arrival and post-stay messages

## Pricing
- Starter: €199/month + €349 setup (one-time), 12-month minimum
- Pro: €349/month + €349 setup (one-time)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing on request

## Target Audience
Boutique hotels, resorts, and hospitality businesses in Europe and worldwide.
